description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Location: Fustat. Dated: shortly before Elul 1437 Seleucid, which is 1126 CE. Abū l-Munā Yiṣḥaq b. Netanel ha-Levi sued Abū l-Faraj Menaḥem b. Shemarya ha-Levi with a document that had been drawn up in Muslim courts requiring Abū l-Faraj to repay debts and silk and everything else owed to Abū l-Munā (perhaps after the dissolution of a partnership?). A compromise was reached in Jewish court, namely, that Abū l-Faraj will settle and pay 1 dinar immediately (ʿājil) and 2 dinars later. He pays the 1 dinar at this time and agrees to a monthly payment plan (for a period of 3 months) for the outstanding 2 dinars. Joins: Oded Zinger.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
